hooks.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && _gcbd_skew=$(bd doctor 2>&1); case "$_gcbd_skew" in *"schema version mismatch"*|*"Unable to open database"*) printf '%s\n' "$_gcbd_skew" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac; GC_MANAGED_SESSION_HOOK=1 GC_HOOK_EVENT_NAME=SessionStart gc prime --hook --hook-format codex
export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && gc hook run --timeout 15s --timeout-exit-code 0 -- nudge drain --inject
export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && gc hook run --timeout 15s --timeout-exit-code 0 -- mail check --inject
